details: Labor Department of Chhattisgarh State started this scheme "Asangathit Karmakar Prasuti Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 10 April 2018. The main objective of the scheme to empower unorganized worker by providing financial help for the delivery assistance.
eligibility: Applicant must be registered unorganized worker.
Applicant can be male or female.
Applicant will be not eligible if he/she is contract workers, female domestic workers, porters and sanitation workers.

online: All the applicant have to visit the official
On the home page click on "
" under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board".
What do you want to do : "Aavedan"
Check the eligibility criteria for registration in Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board and click next.
Select your district name and provide old/new registration number and click next.
Fill out the online with required details.

documents_required: A scanned copy of the registration certificate.
It is mandatory to have authorized verification of pregnancy of the female worker by a doctor, ANM or Mitanin.

faqs.question: What is this scheme?
faqs.answer: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Asangathit Karmakar Prasuti Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 10 April 2018.

faqs.question: What is the objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The main objective of the scheme to empower unorganized worker by providing financial help for the delivery assistance.

faqs.question: Who can get the benefits?
faqs.answer: All eligible registered unorganized labor individuals from Chhattisgarh State.

faqs.question: Can applicant get the benefits multiple times?
faqs.answer: Applicant can get the scheme benefits only two times

faqs.question: Who will get the benefit if a woman dies during childbirth?
faqs.answer: Benefits will be provided to her husband/children or equally among all successor.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicant must be registered under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board", only than applicant can apply for the scheme.

faqs.question: How can applicant register under Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board" ?
faqs.answer: 1. All the applicant have to visit the official website Chhattisgarh Labour Department. 2. On the home page click on "Apply" under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board". 3. Enter the following details, Select Group Name : "Asangathit Marmakaar Mandal" Select Service : "Asangathit Shramik Panjikaran" What do you want to do : "Aavedan"Click next. 4. Check the eligibility criteria for registration in Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board and click next. 5. Fill out the online "Registration form". 6. Submit.

faqs.question: What is the official website to apply for the scheme?
What documents are required for registration?
faqs.answer: 1. Birth certificate of the child. 2. A scanned copy of the registration certificate. 3. Mobile Number. 4. Aadhaar Card. 5. Bank passbook photo copy. 6. It is mandatory to have authorized verification of pregnancy of the female worker by a doctor, ANM or Mitanin.
